agents.name: AI Compliance Checker
agents.description: Automated AML/CFT compliance checks for Singapore financial institutions. Screens transactions, flags suspicious activity, generates regulatory reports. MAS 626 compliant.

agents.name: Regulatory Calendar Bot
agents.description: Tracks MAS, FATF, FOMC, ECB deadlines and central bank meetings. Sends weekly briefings and alerts for new regulations. Never miss a compliance deadline again.

agents.name: KYC Document Analyzer
agents.description: Auto-extract data from passports, IDs, proofs of address. Flag discrepancies and potential fraud. Integrate with your existing onboarding flow. PDPA compliant.

agents.name: Weather Trading Signal Generator
agents.description: Aviation weather (METAR) arbitrage signals. Identifies mismatches between weather forecasts and market prices. 10 airports monitored 24/7. Backtested win rate: 67%.

agents.name: Crypto Compliance Monitor
agents.description: Monitor crypto transactions for AML/CFT red flags. Integrates with major exchanges and wallets. FATF Travel Rule compliant. Real-time alerts for suspicious activity.

agents.name: Financial News Summarizer
agents.description: AI-powered financial news analysis. Monitors 500+ sources, generates executive summaries, flags market-moving events. Customizable by sector, geography, sentiment.

agents.name: Contract Review Assistant
agents.description: AI-powered contract review. Flags risky clauses, suggests improvements, ensures compliance with Singapore law. Reduces legal review time by 70%.

agents.name: Customer Support Agent
agents.description: Autonomous customer support agent. Handles 80% of tickets without human intervention. Integrates with Zendesk, Intercom, email. Multilingual (EN, ZH, MS, TA).

agents.name: Investment Research Analyst
agents.description: AI equity research analyst. Analyzes financial statements, industry trends, competitor positioning. Generates investment memos with buy/sell/hold recommendations.

agents.name: Social Media Content Generator
agents.description: AI-powered social media content creation. Generates LinkedIn posts, Twitter threads, Instagram captions. Brand voice customization. Schedule and auto-publish.
